coverage.label: Browser wallet commit and wager deposit
Direct 0G Compute broker
coverage.proof: Direct 0G Compute providers are discoverable, but wallet balance is below the 3 0G ledger minimum for broker funding. Top up 0x3D325E51934AE5c7EBf9f37a8Ddf772F48F766Fb with at least 2.969183 0G, then rerun with OG_COMPUTE_BROKER_AUTOFUND=1 to create the broker ledger.

coverage.label: Runtime match compute authority
coverage.proof: 0G Compute Router failed: 0G Compute request failed: 402 {"error":{"message":"Insufficient balance","type":"payment_error","code":"insufficient_balance"},"request_id":"c426d339-9155-44f4-8dee-922f5d9aff42"} | Direct 0G Compute broker failed: Direct 0G Compute broker ledger is not ready and OG_COMPUTE_BROKER_AUTOFUND is not enabled: Account does not exist. Please create an account first using "add-account". (Address: 0x3D325E51934AE5c7EBf9f37a8Ddf772F48F766Fb)
